methodology.phantom_score_class: Catalog #249: <axis> score in <other-axis>-named directory; e.g. diagnostic-CPU score in *_cuda_work/ dir
methodology.mps_noise_class: CLAUDE.md non-negotiable: MPS PoseNet 23x drift; SegNet 2x; final score 2.5x worse vs contest-CUDA
methodology.macos_advisory_promotion_class: Catalog #192: macOS-CPU advisory promoted to score claim without paired Linux x86_64 GHA
methodology.diagnostic_cpu_non_promotable: Catalog #221: diagnostic-CPU is non-promotable; quoting as score claim is custody violation
methodology.no_custody_chain_default: Numeric anchor with no archive sha + runtime tree path in context; preserved as historical, NOT killed per CLAUDE.md "KILL is LAST RESORT"

remediation_policy: PER CLAUDE.md "KILL is the LAST RESORT" non-negotiable: every POTENTIALLY-CORRUPTED anchor remains DEFERRED-pending-re-verification with documented reactivation criteria. NO anchor is killed.
